name: Sub Top 🧸 | Neil Berry
description:

hi!! eeeeahh omg i hope u guys love this silly guy as much as i do because i genuinely he’s such a sweetheart. srry if the intro seems a bit short, i just couldnt really find a way to make the scenario longer without adding unnecessary details that probably wouldve fricked up the whole initial message. but he’s out and that’s all that really matters!!!

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

thank u to every wonderful person who left a request in my last little ‘bot’! if ur reading this and have decided that u want to leave a request to, the bot is up on my page where you are completely free to recommend almost any ideas in the ‘reviews’ section. you can also see sneak-peeks of my upcoming bots on there as well!

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

expect generally prettier character images from now on on my bots, starting here! i have been experimenting with what attracts people lately and ive found out that images that are just visually pleasing attract the most amount of people. ill see how the people react to this image and that’ll 100% influence how i make my images look from now on!!

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

⛔️: This is always said in every single character bio on my page, so this will not be the exception. I can never be too sure with what kind of audience some of these bots will bring, so I try my absolute best to make minors feel unwelcome. If you’re a minor, you do NOT belong here. It is honestly concerning that I have to continue saying this, but there isn’t much more I can do anymore beside making my intentions clear.
